english: How has the Dravidian movement in Tamil Nadu influenced the regional identity in South India?
hindi: द्रविड़ आंदोलन के माध्यम से तमिलनाडु में दक्षिण भारतीय क्षेत्रीय पहचान पर क्या प्रभाव पड़ा है?
tamil: தமிழகத்தில் திராவிட இயக்கம் தென்னிந்திய பகுதி அடையாளத்தில் என்ன பாதிப்பு ஏற்பட்டது?
vietnamese: Cách Dravidian phong trào ở Tamil Nadu ảnh hưởng đến bản sắc khu vực ở Nam Ấn Độ?
correct_answer: The Dravidian movement in Tamil Nadu has significantly contributed to the development of a distinct regional identity in South India, emphasizing the cultural and linguistic differences between the Dravidian-speaking peoples and the rest of India.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that the Dravidian movement has a broader national impact or by refusing to answer due to the subjective nature of regional identity.
